description: Template for CLONE_REPORT.json output - shows expected structure with placeholder values

field_descriptions.timestamp: ISO 8601 datetime when all cloning operations completed
field_descriptions.summary.total_repos: Total number of repositories attempted to clone
field_descriptions.details: Array of individual clone operation results
field_descriptions.detail.name: Repository name
field_descriptions.detail.clone_url: Git URL used for clone operation
field_descriptions.detail.target_path: Local filesystem path where repo was/will be stored
field_descriptions.detail.error: Error message if clone failed, null if successful
field_descriptions.detail.attempt: Number of attempts made (1 = first try, 2+ = retries)
field_descriptions.detail.duration_seconds: Time taken for clone operation in seconds

title: CLONE_REPORT Template
